message:
fix(tests): tighten s0cmk fixture + v0p2i stampede-advice assertion (self-review)

Self-review findings applied as fixups to two pane-3 commits from the
current session.

---

1. tests/cli_robot.rs — fixture name (review of c08b544f)

The seeded fixture for s0cmk
(`search_with_intact_db_but_wiped_lexical_degrades_with_truthful_warning`)
used filename `s0cmk-fixture-01.jsonl`. Without the `rollout-` prefix
that franken_agent_detection::CodexConnector::is_rollout_file requires
(upstream `franken_agent_detection/src/connectors/codex.rs` ~L77), the
connector silently skips the file and `cass index --full` produces an
empty DB. The test still passed because its contract is warning-text
based (exit 0 + "Tantivy search index not found" + `cass index --full`
hint), but the vestigial seeded keyword was never visible to search —
misleading for any future author who tries to add content-dependent
assertions on top of this fixture.

Renamed to `rollout-s0cmk-01.jsonl` so the Codex connector actually
ingests it, with an inline comment flagging the prefix requirement.
Same contract assertions continue to pass — now with a meaningful DB
behind them.

---

2. tests/e2e_health.rs — stampede-advice assertion (review of a3d8d2c8)

`status_recommended_action_during_active_rebuild_says_wait_not_reindex`
checked for two quoted forms of stampede advice:

    !lower.contains("run 'cass index'")
    !lower.contains("run `cass index`")

A future regression that phrased the advice without quotes (e.g. "Run
cass index to rebuild" or "Please run cass index --full") would slip
past both checks because neither matches without the quote chars. That
hollows out the core "no stampede advice" contract the test is meant
to enforce.

Added a third unquoted check:

    && !lower.contains("run cass index")

so all three phrasings — single-quoted, backtick, and plain — trip the
assertion equally. No src change; the current `run_status` text
("Index rebuild is already in progress") still passes.

---

Verification:
  CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/rch_target_cass_p3 \
  rch exec -- cargo test --test cli_robot \
    search_with_intact_db_but_wiped_lexical_degrades_with_truthful_warning
  -> 1 passed in 2.11s

  CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/rch_target_cass_p3 \
  rch exec -- cargo test --test e2e_health \
    status_recommended_action_during_active_rebuild_says_wait_not_reindex
  -> 1 passed in 0.04s

Other pane-3 commits reviewed clean (0a8y3, 2hh1s, 8qet9, ev4f7, jogco).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
